title: LSH-SFA: Spacetime Field Attention with Wave Packets, Light-Cone Causality, and PDE-Driven Evolution
description: We present LSH-SFA (Spacetime Field Attention), a novel neural architecture that replaces the core mechanisms of Transformer with physically grounded alternatives. Instead of QKV dot-product attention, LSH-SFA represents each token as a wave packet (k, w, ω, θ) encoding semantic position, content, frequency, and phase, and computes attention via Gaussian similarity in O(n) linear time. Instead of hard causal masking, it introduces a light-cone mechanism with frequency-adaptive decay. Instead of feed-forward networks, it employs PDE-driven field evolution: a diffusion equation for bidirectional tasks and a convection equation for causal generation. On AG News text classification, a 2-layer LSH-SFA with 1.02M parameters achieves 91.80% accuracy, matching a 4-layer Transformer baseline while using 14% fewer parameters. On WikiText-2 language modeling, LSH-SFA achieves perplexity of 654 vs. the Transformer's 1069 (39% lower), with no overfitting observed.
